text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Fukukitaru replied to my message... Maybe
she's writing to tell me my fortune?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My lucky item is a vehicle... All r-right, time to
get on a train!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, things are definitely going to go my way
today!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What else does my fortune say? Let me see...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? My lucky item is... a shachihoko? And vehicles are actually... my unlucky item?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what now?! I got it all wrong... I need to
get off!

text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Welcome aboard! You're traveling today on an
express service train. There will be no stops made
until the final station.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! Is there any salvation for me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's it! Excuse me, but does anyone happen
to have a shachihoko on them?!

Meisho Doto skips her training, a little too
concerned about her fortune.
